sectionSubtitle: Technical excellence, structured methodology and traceable results.

items.subtitle: Technical support for stable medical operating environments
items.intro: In sensitive environments, it's not just about getting a system running again – it's about implementing the solution cleanly, with proper documentation and operational safety. LAB-ROOT works with an understanding of regulatory requirements and high availability.

focus.title: Diagnostics & Lab Analytics
focus.desc: Component-level diagnostics on analyzers, centrifuges and laboratory automation.

focus.title: Imaging Systems
focus.desc: Technical support for X-ray, ultrasound and endoscopy systems.

focus.title: Documented Processes
focus.desc: Structured documentation aligned with GMP standards for every measure.

focus.title: Regulatory Understanding
focus.desc: Work with regard to IEC 62353, MPBetreibV and ISO 13485-aligned processes.

audience: Laboratories and clinics with technical self-responsibility
Medical technology companies requiring external support
Facilities with medical-adjacent systems (veterinary, dental, rehab)
strengths: Root-cause diagnostics instead of quick fixes
Experience with lab analytics & imaging systems

items.subtitle: Practical engineering support for industrial systems
items.intro: When production or process environments are affected, more than a quick fix is needed. LAB-ROOT brings technical clarity and clean implementation – with a focus on availability in real-world operations.

focus.title: PLC & Automation
focus.desc: Diagnostics, repair and integration of PLC systems (Siemens, Allen-Bradley, Beckhoff).

focus.title: Drive Technology
focus.desc: Frequency inverters, servo controllers and motor controls at component level.

focus.title: Sensors & Actuators
focus.desc: Integration and fault analysis of industrial sensors, valves and actuators.

focus.title: Control Cabinet Engineering
focus.desc: Inspection, modification and documentation of industrial control panels.

audience: Production facilities with automated manufacturing lines
Companies with complex electronic control systems
Facilities with recurring faults without clear causes
strengths: Experience with PLC, drive technology & industrial electronics
Sustainable stabilization instead of short-term workarounds

items.subtitle: Stable IT infrastructure for reliable operations
items.intro: From servers and networks to monitoring, backup and automation. We help keep IT environments operational, organized and resilient – with a focus on structure over complexity.

focus.title: Servers & Systems
focus.desc: Linux/Windows servers, virtualization with Proxmox/VMware, container orchestration with Docker.

focus.title: Network & Connectivity
focus.desc: Network architecture, firewalls, VPN, VLAN segmentation and system integration.

focus.title: Monitoring & Operations
focus.desc: Zabbix, Grafana, Prometheus – structured monitoring with clear alerting.

focus.title: Automation
focus.desc: Ansible, Docker, CI/CD – automate recurring tasks, reduce overhead.

audience: SMEs that need a stable IT foundation
Companies with recurring IT issues without clear causes
Teams looking to improve monitoring and transparency
strengths: Experience with Linux, containers & cloud infrastructure
Practical implementation instead of unnecessary complexity
